compatibility: All Gen 1 and Gen 2 R1S and R1T owners. Coming to R2 at launch.
alexa: Enabling Rivian Assistant disables Alexa integration — you cannot run both simultaneously.
ownerNote: I've been using Hey Rivian since 2026.15 dropped. The biggest thing: you don't need to memorize commands — just talk to it like a person and it figures it out. The conversational navigation chaining is genuinely better than anything I used with Alexa. The unintentional wake word activations at highway speed are real but infrequent.

commands.notes: Natural conversational phrasing — no need to use exact commands.

commands.text: Make everyone's seat toasty except mine.
commands.notes: Rivian's flagship multi-parameter demo command — controls individual seat heating in a single request.
Air suspension equipped vehicles only.
R1T only.
Requires HomeLink or compatible smart home integration configured in settings.
Requires HomeLink or compatible smart home integration configured in settings.

commands.text: Take me to the nearest car wash.
Find a Buc-ee's along my route.
commands.notes: Route-aware POI search — works with any brand or category, not just Buc-ee's.
Conversational chaining — combines POI search with charging stop planning.

commands.text: Can I make it there without charging?
commands.notes: Range-aware navigation query.

commands.text: Find a place to eat near my next charging stop.
commands.notes: Multi-step agentic command.

commands.text: Find a coffee shop on the way to my next appointment and text my contact an ETA.
commands.notes: Requires Google Calendar integration. Demonstrates full agentic chaining.

commands.text: Navigate to a Rivian Adventure Network charger.

commands.notes: Works across Apple Music, Spotify, Tidal, and SiriusXM.

commands.text: Text Sarah and tell her I'm running late.
commands.notes: Natural phrasing works — no need to dictate the exact message.

commands.text: Text John I'll arrive in 20 minutes.
commands.notes: Can send in your preferred tone.
Requires Google Calendar connected in settings.
Requires Google Calendar.
Requires Google Calendar. Full calendar management via voice.

commands.text: What time do I need to leave?
commands.notes: Requires Google Calendar.

commands.text: What does this warning light mean?
commands.notes: Rivian bills the assistant as an encyclopedia for your vehicle — replaces digging through the owner's manual.

commands.text: How do I use camp mode?
How do I open the charge port manually?
What tire pressure should I use?
What's the weather at my destination?
When does the national park close?

commands.notes: The assistant has personality — conversational and general knowledge queries work just as well as vehicle commands.

commands.text: What's a good podcast for a long drive?

limitations: Requires active Connect+ subscription or trial ($14.99/month or $149.99/year)
Enabling Rivian Assistant disables Alexa — you cannot run both
Cloud connection required — does not work offline
Some owners report unintentional wake word activations at highway speed
Profile PIN prompt occasionally appears on every startup even when not set
Third-party integrations limited to Google Calendar at launch — more coming
Will not control safety-critical systems (windows, brakes)
tips: Just chat with it naturally — 'I'm running late, text my wife' works as well as any structured command. You don't need to memorize specific phrases.
Use conversational phrasing rather than keyword commands. 'I'm cold' works better than 'Set HVAC 70'.
The assistant remembers context within a session — you can say 'make it warmer' after setting a temperature without repeating yourself.
Connect Google Calendar in Settings to unlock the full agentic chaining features.
Personal context is saved to your individual driver profile — household members won't see your preferences.
You can disable the Hey Rivian wake word, limit location sharing, or turn off the memory feature in privacy settings.

changes: Initial launch — Hey Rivian available to all Gen 1 and Gen 2 R1S and R1T owners on Connect+
Google Calendar integration — first agentic third-party integration
Full vehicle control, navigation chaining, media, messaging, and owner's guide categories live
